name: Farnam Horseshoer's Secret Horse Hoof Care Hoof Conditioner
description: Help your horse feel light on his feet with Farnam Horseshoer's Secret Deep-Penetrating Hoof Oil for Horses. This moisturizing hoof oil penetrates deep to condition and protect hooves like no other hoof dressing around. The formula is high in essential fatty acids and natural moisturizers and absorbs quickly to effectively condition dry hooves. Avocado oil in the formula penetrates deep to stimulate collagen production at the coronary band. Glycerin attracts moisture to the hoof, while mineral oil helps lock it in. Use this hoof oil to help restore damaged hooves and prevent cracks, splits and contracted heels. It also helps enhance the color, sheen and texture of your horse’s hooves. Your horse will be kicking up his heels with this restorative hoof dressing!
